requirementCueLines: [Page 1] Degree Requirements Effective AUT 2024 (Purple Curriculum)
[Page 1] environment, ethics & social justice, natural science, population health, policy & politics, and social science with particular emphasis on
[Page 1] exploration in public health, emphasizing the natural sciences.
[Page 1] diversity of the cohort.
[Page 1] PATHWAY OPTIONS
[Page 1] Complete the following by the deadline to be considered:
[Page 1] 1. Min. 60 college credits
[Page 1] > Global Health (BA Option; BS Option)
[Page 1] 3. Min. grade of 2.0 in 5 credits of English composition
[Page 1] following: ENV H 111, EPI 201, EPI 220, G H 101, HSERV 100,
[Page 1] NUTR 200, PHG 200 or one 5-credit course from AAS, AES,
[Page 1] > Health Education & Promotion (BA Option)
[Page 1] competencies required for the Certified Health Education Specialist
[Page 1] > Nutritional Sciences (BS Option)
[Page 1] DEGREE REQUIREMENTS
[Page 1] In addition to major requirements outlined on the back page,
[Page 1] students complete general education requirements for the School CONTACT
[Page 1] requirements. Students who enter the major through upper division https://sph.washington.edu/phgh/advising
[Page 2] PUBLIC HEALTH - GLOBAL HEALTH MAJOR REQUIREMENTS
[Page 2] BA: Option
[Page 2] Bachelor of BA: Option
[Page 2] Bachelor of BS: Option BS: Option
